title: Xbox Edition
description: This project recreates the classic Minecraft Xbox 360 Edition experience with custom mods and textures. Its goal is to revive the original gameplay and nostalgic feeling on PC.
body:
This modpack is carefully designed to recreate the classic Minecraft Xbox 360 Edition experience on PC. It brings back the original visuals, sounds, menus, and gameplay style using optimized mods and high-quality custom textures. The main goal of this project is to offer a smooth, nostalgic, and enjoyable experience for players who miss the old console version. It is lightweight, easy to install, and specially optimized for low-end and low-resource PCs, ensuring good performance even on modest systems. This project is actively maintained and continuously improved to provide a stable, immersive, and fun experience for the Minecraft community.
# **Discord Server**
